title: papaver dubium subsp. pinnatifidum
intro: Papaver dubium subsp. pinnatifidum is a subspecies of the poppy plant, known for its unique, pinnately divided leaves and delicate, papery flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and antispasmodic properties, derived from the alkaloids present in its poppy seeds. The health benefits of Papaver dubium subsp. pinnatifidum include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as its potential to aid in pain management and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves or flowers in hot water or by using the plant's seeds as a natural remedy in teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
